title: Telephone number architecture - Open Government Portal
content:
## Telephone number architecture
This dataset provides the format of telephone numbers in Canada based on the Canadian Numbering and Dialling Plan from the Canadian Numbering Administrator. This dataset also aligns with the ITU-T E.164 and the North American Numbering Plan.
Find more resources with the keyword “ reference data ”
- Publisher - Current Organization Name: Treasury Board of Canada Secretariat
- Licence: Open Government Licence - Canada
